mapper.select: SELECT ID, MAINT_INFO_ID, WORK_ORDER_NO, ACTION_CODE, ACTION_NAME, FROM_STATUS, TO_STATUS, OPERATE_BY, OPERATE_BY_NAME, OPERATE_TIME, REMARK, SNAPSHOT_JSON, DEL_FLAG, DELETE_BY, DELETE_BY_NAME, DELETE_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MAINT_INFO_LOG WHERE MAINT_INFO_ID = #{maintInfoId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY OPERATE_TIME DESC, CREATE_TIME DESC, ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MAINT_INFO_LOG ( ID, MAINT_INFO_ID, WORK_ORDER_NO, ACTION_CODE, ACTION_NAME, FROM_STATUS, TO_STATUS, OPERATE_BY, OPERATE_BY_NAME, OPERATE_TIME, REMARK, SNAPSHOT_JSON, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{maintInfoId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{workOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{actionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{actionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{toStatus,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{operateBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{operateByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{snapshotJson,jdbcType=CLOB}, 0, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
